name: Prison School Dating Sim
description:
You have the honor of being the first male student to study at an all-girls' school. For you, a door opens to a world full of challenges and secrets.

The story promises romantic twists as you have the choice between various characters, including Mari Kurihara, Meiko Shiraki, Hana Midorikawa, and Chiyo Kurihara. Each decision in conversations and activities influences the dynamics of the relationships and leads to different turns in this unusual dating simulation at the prison school.
creator: God of Darkness
